case_title: PORTARO, STEVE VS MAR, NANCY et al

docket_entries.description: SECOND PROOF OF SERVICE, NANCY MAR, REGISTERED AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS FILED.
DECLARATION FILED BY DEFT. USE THE FOLLOWING ADDRESS FOR MAIL CORRESPONDENCE TO: P.O. BOX 641041 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94164-1041.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTARO, STEVE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MAR, NANCY CENTRON MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC. THE COURT DISMISSES DEFENDANT NANCY MAR WITH PREJUDICE AS IMPROPERLY NAMED AS A PARTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTARO, STEVE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAR, NANCY CENTRON MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC. $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,655.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MAR, NANCY CENTRON MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC. HEARING SET FOR MAY-31-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
